'''nazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:genteelly|genteelly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:genteelly|genteelly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:nazhate|nazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nazhatesher|nazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhatesherĂ«m|nazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazhatero|nazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nazhateshĂ«|nazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhateshĂ«m|nazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazhatero|gokinazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinazhateshĂ«|gokinazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhateshĂ«m|gokinazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonazhankerom|gonazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonazhankeshĂ«|gonazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazhankeshĂ«m|gonazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonazhankeya|gonazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazhaterom|nazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhatemu|nazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nazhateya|nazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazhaterom|gokinazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhatemu|gokinazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinazhateya|gokinazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nazhazhate|nazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nazhazhatesher|nazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhazhatesherĂ«m|nazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazhazhatero|nazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nazhazhateshĂ«|nazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhazhateshĂ«m|nazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazhazhatero|gokinazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinazhazhateshĂ«|gokinazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhazhateshĂ«m|gokinazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonazhazhankerom|gonazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonazhazhankeshĂ«|gonazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonazhazhankeshĂ«m|gonazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonazhazhankeya|gonazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nazhazhaterom|nazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nazhazhatemu|nazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nazhazhateya|nazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinazhazhaterom|gokinazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinazhazhatemu|gokinazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinazhazhateya|gokinazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠte|nĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠtesher|nĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠtero|nĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokinĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠterom|nĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠtemu|nĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠzhĂŠteya|nĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokinĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokinĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafzhafte|nafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafzhaftesher|nafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafzhaftesherĂ«m|nafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafzhaftero|nafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafzhafteshĂ«|nafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafzhafteshĂ«m|nafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafzhaftero|gokinafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafzhafteshĂ«|gokinafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafzhafteshĂ«m|gokinafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafzhafnkerom|gonafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafzhafnkeshĂ«|gonafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gonafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafzhafnkeya|gonafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafzhafterom|nafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafzhaftemu|nafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafzhafteya|nafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafzhafterom|gokinafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafzhaftemu|gokinafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafzhafteya|gokinafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
